_comment: Salted SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex) of every 6-word shingle in the official Goethe A1/A2/B1 Wortliste PDFs. One-way hashes — this file does NOT contain or reveal the copyrighted source text; it only lets check_example_originality.py detect reused source sentences without redistributing the PDFs. Regenerate with --build-fingerprint.
